---
title: "God\'s Silver, or, Youthful Days"
---

## God\'s Silver, or, Youthful Days

**Author:** Louisa Lilias Greene
**Date:** 1877
**Imprint:** London: Warne

### Notes

This included a story, \'The Haunted Sacks\', which hadappeared in <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1875), 75-101.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
